name: agent-audit-logger-mcp
title: Agent Audit Logger Mcp
description: Hash-chained HMAC-signed audit log MCP for A2A (agent-to-agent) calls. Every tool-call, agent-handoff, decision gets a tamper-evident signed record. EU AI Act Art 12 automatic logs, DORA Art 17 ICT incident logs, ISO 42001 clause 9 monitoring — auditor-ready end-of-day attestations. By MEOK AI Labs.
